page_metadata.biotools__summary: R package for Nucleosome Positioning Prediction. This package is built upon a duration hidden Markov model proposed in Xi et al, 2010; Wang et al, 2008. The core of the package was written in Fotran. In addition to the R package, a stand-alone Fortran software tool is also available.

The core of the package was written in Fotran. In addition to the R package, a stand-alone Fortran software tool is also available.
